summary: Selected #38806 as the best live canonical issue and #38808 as the best non-security canonical PR for the Feishu P2P direct-message thread regression. Split the over-broad cluster into related reply-thread PRs (#39507, #40147), independent Feishu fixes/features, and the security-boundary PR #38996. Because the preflight artifact marks #38996 as security-sensitive and explicitly says no ProjectClownfish mutation is allowed for this cluster, this result emits only non-mutating classifications and routes the cluster for human/security follow-up.
